name: Market Sort
author: Poki
description: Market Sort is a puzzle game where your task is to arrange various items neatly on the shelves! Your task is to categorize different objects found in the market, like pastries, gems, chemicals, and more! Move the same objects to the right shelf until each shelf contains only one type of object. If you find yourself stuck, you could always check out helpful options like hints and undo buttons on the side! Can you take on the challenge and create an organized and tidy market? How to play Market Sort? Click on the items to move them, and click again to place them down. Who created Market Sort? Market Sort is created by PotatoJam. Play their other games on Poki: 1010 Color Match , Monster Duo , Numbers , King of Mahjong , Bring me Cakes , Onet Paradise , Onet Master , and Solitaire Klondike 2.0 ! How can I play Market Sort for free? You can play Market Sort for free on Poki. Can I play Market Sort on mobile devices and desktop? Market Sort can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
